Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to align with the Java 21 migration.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 runtime features and compatibility; the old JDK 11 image would fail to run Java 21 bytecode or support new language features.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package management (apt-get) with Alpine package management (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not support apt-get; using apt-get would result in command not found errors.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update Node.js installation from NodeSource setup script for Node 12 to NVM installation for Node 16.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Node 12 is end-of-life and incompatible with modern build tools; the old installation method is specific to Debian/Ubuntu and Node 12.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer required for the deployment strategy.
Add Maven installation via apk since the new base image does not include Maven by default.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the project; the new base image lacks Maven, causing build failure if not installed.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add libstdc++ dependency required for native libraries or specific Java components on Alpine.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Some Java native libraries or dependencies may require libstdc++ on Alpine Linux to avoid runtime linkage errors.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Git installation to support build-time git information retrieval.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process or application startup may rely on git metadata; Alpine images often lack git by default.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the copy strategy to copy the entire directory including git info to support dokku configuration.
Set PRODUCTION environment variable to true for the production build profile.
Add explicit Maven build step to compile the application during image creation.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous image relied on the base image's Maven or a different build strategy; the new setup requires explicit build steps to produce the JAR.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the container entrypoint from a generic bash shell to running the specific Java JAR file.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container must execute the application; the old CMD was a placeholder/debug shell, while the new ENTRYPOINT ensures the app starts correctly.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for React Toastify CSS styles to ensure toast notifications render correctly.
Add import for MSW Storybook addon to enable API mocking in stories.
Initialize MSW with a dynamic service worker URL that handles both localhost and remote hosting.
Add MSW decorator to the global decorators array to apply mocking context to all stories.

frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.general_idea: Rename the Jekyll site title from a QA-specific label to a generic documentation title.
Remove duplicate and placeholder repo_name configuration entries to clean up the config file.
frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.before:
repo_name: "This-should-be-overridden-by-github-actions-script"

# Build settings
theme: minima
plugins:

# Collections
collections:
  branches:
    output: true
    permalink: /branches/:path/

repo_name: "This-should-be-overridden-by-github-actions-script"
frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.after:
# Build settings
theme: minima
plugins:

# Collections
collections:
  branches:
    output: true
    permalink: /branches/:path/

repo_name: "TBD"

frontend/docs-index/_layouts/default.htm.general_idea: Update the HTML title tag to display the repository name instead of the page-specific title.
Remove the external stylesheet link from the document head.
Refactor the main heading text to be more descriptive and generic.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Add explicit Node.js engine constraint to package.json.
Add nock dependency for HTTP mocking.
Add msw dependency for service worker mocking.
Remove inline eslintConfig block from package.json.
Increase Jest coverage thresholds from 90% to 100%.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern development.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 17 settings on a Java 21 project may miss new language features or fail if source/target compatibility is strictly enforced by the compiler plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Spring Framework 6) due to package refactoring (javax to jakarta) and lack of maintenance, causing compile/runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3 dependencies, leading to classpath conflicts or missing API errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove MongoDB starter dependency as it is no longer used in the project.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for HTTP service simulation in tests.
Add Awaitility dependency for asynchronous testing support.
Add Spring Security Config dependency explicitly for async context propagation.
Add Apache Commons CSV dependency for CSV processing.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin to enable full annotation processing.
Configure Maven Surefire Plugin to use TCP for event transmission to fix test execution issues.
Add Git Commit ID Maven Plugin to generate git properties during build.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven Plugin version from 0.8.7 to 0.8.10.
Update JaCoCo exclusion patterns to reflect new package structure (example to happiercows).
Add JaCoCo check execution to enforce code coverage rules.
Upgrade Pitest Maven Plugin version from 1.7.3 to 1.17.0.
Upgrade Pitest JUnit5 Plugin version from 0.14 to 1.2.1.
Update Pitest configuration to use new package names and add history files.
Add WireMock Maven profile for local development with mocked services.
Add Integration Maven profile for integration testing with H2 database.
Update Node.js version in production profile from v12.12.0 to v16.20.0.
Rename project artifact and name from 'example' to 'happycows' to reflect actual project identity.
